new_text: Session 239 CRITICAL: git filter-repo --invert-paths on integrations/telegram-bot/config.json accidentally removed multiple hook files: enforcer_shim.py, failure_recovery.py, stop_cleanup.py, tg_mirror.py. filter-repo rewrites all commits/branches and removes files introduced in commits that become empty after filtering. Recovery: use git reflog to find pre-filter-repo commit hash and restore: git checkout OLD_HASH -- hooks/enforcer_shim.py hooks/failure_recovery.py hooks/stop_cleanup.py hooks/tg_mirror.py. Session blocked because enforcer_shim.py (PreToolUse hook) missing, blocking all Bash/Write/Edit. LESSON: Always test filter-repo on throwaway clone first.

Evolution-branch is subset of Sprint3 (+36 commits). Key additions: 17 shared modules, 40 MCP analytics tools (9→49), 2 MCP memory tools, 6 gate refactors, 3,982 test additions. Repo: 2.4MB→3.5MB. Token cost: evolution ~1,214 (13 tools), Sprint3 ~6,620 (55 tools)—only when MCP connected. Framework: ~1,794 tokens (10%). Module breakdown: 1 actively used (gate_helpers), 11 power analytics tools, 5 built+tested but unused.

Session 72: Statusline enhancements. Model bracket color now model-identity-based (Opus=dark orange, Sonnet=blue, Haiku=white, fallback=cyan), case-insensitive match. Context % thresholds: 5 tiers cyan<40%, green 40-49%, orange 50-59%, yellow 60-69%, red 70%+. HP bar label+% fully colored. Added 3 indicators: (a) Error pressure E:N (red+fire recent, yellow historical), (b) Memory freshness M:N ↑Xm (minutes since last query), (c) Compression CMP:N (detects 10+ context drops). Added 4 icons: ⚠️, ✅, 💰, 📦. Removed PV:N (redundant). Tests: 980/981 pass (1 pre-existing Gate 13 issue). Final: 20 elements (7 always, 13 conditional).

TRv1 CI/CD workflow fixes COMPLETE (2026-02-20). Applied downstream-project-spl-nightly.yml line 9 and manage-stale-issues.yml line 24 conditionals. Created NEW /home/crab/Desktop/TRv1/.github/workflows/ci.yml with 4 jobs: (1) fmt-check cargo fmt (10min), (2) clippy cargo clippy -D warnings (30min), (3) test-fast 2 packages (30min), (4) test-programs 4 packages (30min). All: rust 1.87.0, ubuntu-latest, cargo cache, apt deps (pkg-config libudev-dev libclang-dev protobuf-compiler). Total: 9 workflow files updated, 1 new file created. All `if: false` files left untouched.

Dashboard Phase 6 data enhancement COMPLETE. Three additions: (1) Gate state conflicts in dependency matrix—/api/gate-state-conflicts shows write conflict warnings (red ⚠) and hot key indicators (orange ◆) on headers, conflict cells get red left border+highlight. (2) Edit-streak hotspots section—/api/edit-streak shows files with high edit counts as bars colored by risk (red ≥5, orange ≥3, cyan), with risk level header. (3) Activity trend D3 stacked bar chart—/api/activity-trend shows pass/warn/block decisions in 30-min buckets over 24h. New CSS classes: .dep-conflict-header, .dep-cell-conflict, .conflict-icon, .hot-icon, .streak-*, .section-subheader, #activity-trend-content. CSS cache v=4. All 21 apiFetch paths verified against 33 server routes.

Extension Pack System COMPLETE (Session 299). Monolithic framework split: core (6 gates) + 5 extension packs (11 gates). Architecture: gates/__init__.py and shared/__init__.py use pkgutil.extend_path for namespace extension. extension_loader.py re-extends gates.__path__ after adding pack roots. conftest.py+harness.py add roots for tests. enforcer.py wraps imports with try/except fallbacks. Pack layout: extensions/<pack>/pack.json + gates/ (no __init__.py needed). Core gates: 01-06 in hooks/gates/. Extension gates: 07,09,10,11,13-19 in packs. CLI: hooks/setup_extension.py (list/install/uninstall/validate).

Phase 2 Gate Fixes Applied (2026-02-09). FIX 4: NotebookEdit added to Gates 1,5,7,8—tool_name check includes 'NotebookEdit', file_path falls back to notebook_path, os.path.normpath() applied. FIX 5: Gate 3 exit code check—after freshness passes, checks state['last_test_exit_code']; non-None and !=0 blocks with 'Last test run failed (exit code: X)' (enforcer.py must SET). FIX 6: Sideband reset—boot.py deletes ~/.claude/hooks/.memory_last_queried during reset. FIX 7: hooks/ exemption removed from Gate 4—EXEMPT_DIRS only contains skills/, hooks/ now requires memory-first. FIX 8: Path normalization—os.path.normpath() applied early in Gate 1 before files_read lookup. All 88 tests pass.

USAGE_GUIDE.md updated (2026-02-24). Added memory system section: L1 ChromaDB (1,341 entries, nomic-embed-text-v2-moe, 768-dim, 7 search modes, UDS socket), L2 Terminal History (FTS5, terminal_history.db 19.8MB, relevance 0.25, Analytics MCP), L3 Telegram (msg_log.db, relevance 0.2). Tracker Pipeline section (17 steps) with Mentor System (Module A deterministic verdicts). Boot pipeline expanded to 20 steps. Agent types (6) and Teams (4) sections. 34 skills verified by directory. Infrastructure: ramdisk (~544 MB/s tmpfs), enforcer daemon, circuit breakers. Two troubleshooting entries for Gate 4 sideband and mentor escalation.

FeeDistributor medium-severity fixes completed (2026-02-10). M-2: _lerp bounds clamping [0,10000] at line 275-276. M-3: Added restoreLinearTransition() external onlyGovernor function (line 228-232), sets overrideActive=false, emits event, added to interface. M-6: Added getClaimableDAppFees(address), getTotalUnclaimedDAppFees(), registeredDAppCount() (lines 191-206). Fixed PassiveStakingOptimized.t.sol test_voteWeight_zeroForNewUser()—removed conflicting `view` modifier. Tests: 8 new in FeeDistributorMedium.t.sol, 22 existing FeeDistributor tests—all passing (30/30). 17 failures in ChainGovernor.t.sol and RewardMinter.t.sol from concurrent work, NOT these changes.

OptimisticChain ALL 22 security findings FIXED (2026-02-10). 4-agent swarm: snapshot-impl (H-3 ERC20Votes-style vote weight snapshots, binary search), fee-hardener (M-2/M-3/M-6 bounds/governance/views), passive-optimizer (M-4 O(1) counter for votes), low-info-sweep (L-1/L-2/L-3/L-4/L-5 checks/events/getters, I-1/I-2/I-3/I-4 constants/counter/messages/getters). FINAL: 241 tests (0 failures, 14 suites), +60 new tests. 22/22 RESOLVED: 3 CRITICAL, 4 HIGH, 6 MEDIUM, 5 LOW, 4 INFO.

16 proptest fuzz tests added to /home/crab/agave/programs/stake/src/stake_state.rs (2026-02-10). Inserted after line 3898 in existing proptest block. CATEGORY 2 (4 tests): State machine—permanent_lock requires Stake, passive_lock requires Initialized, early_unlock rejects tier==0, permanent_lock rejects deactivated. CATEGORY 3 (3 tests): Authority—permanent_lock both signers, passive_lock staker, early_unlock staker. CATEGORY 4 (3 tests): Flags—passive_tier round-trip, bit isolation, permanent_lock idempotent. CATEGORY 5 (4 tests): Lamports—overflow prevention, conservation, monotonic penalty, lamport conservation. EXTRA (2): lockup_epoch no overflow, penalty<stake. All 16 pass. 52 total tests pass (36 existing+16 new). No regressions.

SuperClaude Framework comparison (session 70). 20.8K stars, v4.2.0. Architecture: pytest plugin + 30 markdown commands + 20 personas + 7 modes + 8 MCP servers (Tavily, Serena, Playwright). Token cost: ~14,500/prompt vs ours ~2,200 (6.6x). Injected: CLAUDE.md (3.5K), PLANNING.md (4.5K), KNOWLEDGE.md (6.5K). Safety: 0 blocking gates vs our 11. ConfidenceChecker all 5 methods placeholder code. Memory via Serena MCP (key-value) vs our ChromaDB (semantic). Research: 4-tier depth (entity/temporal/conceptual/causal). Commands load ~5,200 tokens vs our ~500. Tests: 11 vs our 967.

Torus-web redesign integration COMPLETE on branch redesign-integration. 13 tasks, 4 phases, 5-agent team. Results: Tailwind v3→v4 (postcss.config.mjs, @theme inline), 57 shadcn/ui replaced (7 new: button-group, empty, field, input-group, item, kbd, spinner), 4 visual components replaced, Navbar merged (redesign+admin checks+hydration guard), 5 static pages replaced, eSports restyled+API integrated, Profile restyled+API preserved, pool-card.tsx fixed, legacy clientLayout.tsx deleted, build clean 0 TS errors. 40+ API routes, 12 models, admin, rankings, wallet-provider UNTOUCHED.

feat/ai-api-gateway vs Design-v2.1 comparison (March 2, 2026). KEY FINDINGS: Wallet integration removed—reverted to mock functions. API fetching removed—hardcoded data. Auth system stripped. Real-time replaced with mockups. 17 FILES CHANGED: app/ai-gateway/page.tsx (84 lines removed), app/profile/page.tsx (516 lines—Steam/X auth), wallet-provider.tsx (217 simplified), player-rankings.tsx (299 changed), esports/page.tsx (387 changed), 12 more. RESTORATION NEEDED: (1) wagmi/AppKit, (2) fetch calls, (3) useEffect hooks, (4) auth flows, (5) Steam/X logic, (6) referral system, (7) Keep new CSS+visuals.

Statusline.py performance analysis. BOTTLENECK: is_worker_available(retries=3) line 1078—unconditional every render, 1500ms sleep when UDS socket missing. FIX: retries=0. SECONDARY: 8 functions redundantly glob+load state_*.json (~2.5ms each). REFACTOR: load once at main(). 8 functions: get_error_pressure, get_error_velocity, get_most_used_tool, get_total_tool_calls, get_pending_count, get_subagent_status, get_plan_mode_warns, get_verification_ratio. OTHER COSTS: os.walk 0.5ms, listdir 0.4ms, LIVE_STATE reads 0.2ms, git subprocess 8-15ms, stats-cache 60s TTL. STABLE: No timeout. Fail-open try/except. I/O: ~9 reads, 2-4 writes, 8 globs, 1 socket/render.
